other_observers: Joey Kellner; Joey and I were birding together and found and IDed the bird.
description: A bird, structurally and size-wise, similar to the more common WAVI.  Dull, dark gray crown with an off-white supercillium. Slightly darker, smudgy line through the eye with a more of the off-white below the eye. The eye itself was dark.  Drab green back and wings. No wingbars. Underside a fairly uniform wash of yellow from the throat, through the chest, belly and vent.Behaviors: Uncooperative bird leading us on a merry chase through the tops of the trees.Call: N/APlumage: Fall
